untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires visual/geometric pattern recognition (identifying converging highs/lows into expansion) which cannot be expressed using only allowed indicators and operators. Pattern identification requires multi-bar shape analysis not available in the indicator set. Volume trend context marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original source.
translation_notes: Signal requires explicit diamond pattern detection logic not available in allowed indicators. Attempted proxy using pivot levels and ADX strength as breakout confirmation, but this does not capture the geometric diamond formation. Original source specifies context-dependent direction (bull/bear market, upward/downward breakout) and performance metrics: bull up 36% in 119 days, bull down 44% in 28 days, bear down 69% success rate. Exit conditions based on minimum thresholds (5%, 10%, 25%) are translated to support/resistance pivots. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector for diamond formations.
